name: opendraft-marketplace
description: OpenDraft MCP Server — the #1 app store for AI agents. 22 tools including zero-friction quick_purchase, template generation, publishing, and cloud deployment. Compatible with Claude Desktop, Cursor, OpenClaw, and any MCP client.

features.zero_friction_purchase: quick_purchase — single call creates account, generates API key, and returns payment link. No onboarding steps.
features.headless_checkout: headless_checkout — API-driven payment link without browser redirects
features.template_generation: generate_template — create React apps from text prompts
features.auto_publish: publish_listing — set listings live without manual review
features.cloud_deploy: deploy_listing — ship to Netlify or Vercel via API
features.demand_capture: Empty searches are logged as demand signals — builders create what agents need
features.webhook_subscriptions: Subscribe to new_listing, price_drop, new_bounty events with category/tech/price filters
features.persistent_api_keys: Generate od_ prefixed keys that never expire
features.ai_matching: Semantic search ranks listings by relevance to agent's needs
features.decision_factors: get_listing returns structured decision data (has_demo, seller_verified, completeness)

workflows.fastest_purchase: quick_purchase (one call — auto account + payment link)
